info.title: Customer 360 API
info.description:
The Customer 360 API provides unified access to customer interaction history and insights across all 8x8 contact center channels.

Given a customer identity (email, phone number, contact ID, or account ID), the API returns a list of interactions along with aggregated sentiment and topic insights.

## Authentication

All endpoints require an 8x8 API key obtained from the 8x8 Admin Console. Pass the key in the `x-api-key` request header:

```
x-api-key: <your-api-key>
```

Refer to [How to get API Keys](/analytics/docs/how-to-get-api-keys) for instructions on creating an API key.

## Regions

The API is available in four regions. Use the base URL corresponding to the region where your tenant is provisioned:

| Region | Base URL |
|---|---|
| Phoenix (US) | `https://api.8x8.com/cidp-customer-360/us` |
| London (UK) | `https://api.8x8.com/cidp-customer-360/uk` |
| Toronto (Canada) | `https://api.8x8.com/cidp-customer-360/ca` |
| Sydney (Australia) | `https://api.8x8.com/cidp-customer-360/ap` |

## Search Strategies

The API supports four mutually exclusive search strategies. You must provide exactly one identity field per request:

| Strategy | Required | Optional | Forbidden |
|---|---|---|---|
| Contact ID | `contactId`, `crmId` | — | — |
| Account ID | `accountId` | `crmId` | — |
| Email | `email` | — | `crmId` |
| Phone Number | `phoneNumber` | — | `crmId` |

Only the native CRM is supported. Set `crmId` to `native`.

## Time Range

If `startTime` and `endTime` are omitted, a default window of 1 year ending at the current time is applied. Times must be in ISO-8601 format with timezone (e.g. `2025-08-15T10:30:00-05:00`).

## Response Fields

### interactions
A list of individual interactions matching the search criteria. Each interaction includes:
- `interactionId` — Unique identifier for the interaction
- `mediaType` — Channel type: `PHONE`, `EMAIL`, `CHAT`, or `VOICEMAIL`
- `direction` — `INBOUND` or `OUTBOUND`
- `productType` — 8x8 product that handled the interaction: `CC` (Contact Center), `UC` (Unified Communications), or `ENGAGE`
- `startedAt` / `endedAt` — Unix epoch milliseconds
- `sentiment` — Overall sentiment: `POSITIVE`, `NEUTRAL`, or `NEGATIVE`
- `topics` — List of topics detected in the interaction, each with a name and match count
- `wrapUpCodes` — Agent wrap-up codes applied at the end of the interaction
- `queueName` — Name of the queue that handled the interaction
- `outcomeLabel` — Outcome label assigned to the interaction
- `interactionLabels` — Labels applied to the interaction

### insights
Aggregated analysis across all returned interactions:
- `aggregatedSentiments` — Overall customer, agent, and combined sentiment across all interactions
- `aggregatedTopics` — Topic frequency breakdown showing which topics appeared most often and in what percentage of interactions

tags.name: interactions-insight
tags.description: Retrieve interaction insights for a customer

get.description:
Retrieves interaction insights for a tenant, including interactions list and speech analytics.

Supports four search strategies:
- `contactId` + `crmId` (both required)
- `accountId` (crmId optional)
- `email` (crmId must not be provided)
- `phoneNumber` (crmId must not be provided)

If `startTime` and `endTime` are omitted, a default time window is applied (1 year).

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The tenant identifier. Must belong to the authenticated customer.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID. `crmId` is optional when provided.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address. `crmId` must not be provided.

parameters.name: phoneNumber
parameters.description: Phone number in E.164 format. `crmId` must not be provided.

parameters.name: crmId
parameters.description: CRM identifier. Required with `contactId`, optional with `accountId`, forbidden with `email`/`phoneNumber`. Only the native CRM is supported.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Start of the time range in ISO-8601 format with timezone offset. Defaults to 1 year before `endTime`.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: End of the time range in ISO-8601 format with timezone offset. Defaults to now.

400.description: Bad request — invalid or missing search criteria

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

403.description: Forbidden — tenant does not belong to the authenticated customer

get.description:
Retrieves transcript summaries for one or more interaction IDs.

Pass one or more `interactionId` query parameters. The API returns successfully retrieved summaries and lists any IDs that could not be retrieved as partial failures.

A maximum of 50 interaction IDs can be provided per request.

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: The tenant identifier. Must belong to the authenticated customer.

parameters.name: interactionId
parameters.description: One or more interaction IDs. Repeat the parameter for batch retrieval (e.g. ?interactionId=id1&interactionId=id2).

200.description: Successfully retrieved transcript summaries. Partial failures are included in the response body.

content.result: Customer called about a billing discrepancy. Agent verified the charge and issued a credit. Customer confirmed satisfaction.

400.description: Bad request — missing or invalid interactionId parameter

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

403.description: Forbidden — tenant does not belong to the authenticated customer

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: 8x8 API key obtained from the 8x8 Admin Console.

interactions.description: List of interactions matching the search criteria

insights.description: Aggregated sentiment and topic insights (null if Speech Analytics not licensed)

contactId.description: CRM contact identifier associated with the interaction

mediaIdentifier.description: The customer email or phone number used in this interaction

chatType.description: Sub-type for chat interactions (e.g. platform or channel variant)

startedAt.description: Interaction start time as Unix epoch milliseconds

endedAt.description: Interaction end time as Unix epoch milliseconds

wrapUpCodes.description: Agent wrap-up codes applied to the interaction

queueName.description: Name of the queue that handled the interaction

outcomeLabel.description: Outcome label assigned to the interaction

title.description: AI-generated title for the interaction (planned for future release, currently null)

emailSubject.description: Email subject line (planned for future release, currently null)

departmentName.description: Department name associated with the interaction (planned for future release, currently null)

signals.description: Detected signals from the interaction (planned for future release, currently empty)

totalInteractions.description: Total number of interactions included in the aggregation

aggregatedCustomerSentiment.description: Overall aggregated customer sentiment across all interactions

aggregatedAgentSentiment.description: Overall aggregated agent sentiment across all interactions

aggregatedOverallSentiment.description: Overall aggregated sentiment across all interactions

totalInteractions.description: Total number of interactions included in the topic aggregation

interactionsMatchedCount.description: Number of interactions where this topic was detected

percentageMatched.description: Percentage of total interactions where this topic was detected

matches.description: Number of times the topic was matched in the interaction

title.description: Short description of the error class
Short description of the error class
Short description of the error class

partialFailures.description: Interaction IDs for which summaries could not be retrieved

summaryObjectId.description: Unique identifier of the summary object

result.example: Customer called about a billing discrepancy. Agent verified the charge and issued a credit.

duration.description: Duration of the interaction in seconds

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the summary was created

sizeBytes.description: Size of the summary content in bytes

interactionId.description: Interaction identifier for which the summary could not be retrieved

reason.description: Reason the summary could not be retrieved. Possible values: 'Summary not found', 'Summary not available'.
